Wednesday-14:00 Meghana's biryani fires on May 6, not today. No food signal in slice. Correct behaviour is silence on tasks — the persona tests lane discipline against three out-of-lane emails.

Thursday ~8pm North Indian dinner from Amber or Kareem's — recurring (~6 orders in 12 months, alternating)
personas.notes: BACKFILL — onboarded today. Empty calendar. Mailbox shows two clean recurring patterns the agent should mine and emit as preference_updates with quantitative confidence (order counts + day-of-week + ~time). Profile narrative already mentions both restaurants but the BACKFILL job is to confirm cadence from email evidence. No grocery/Instamart emails exist in mailbox so no staple-cadence preferences are expected. Tasks should be empty: today is Friday, profile has no Friday food pattern, and even Mitali's Flurys mention should be skipped (social invitation, not an order trigger).

personas.notes: STEADY-STATE — Today's slice has no food-order emails. The single skip tests specificity (Mumbai-trip dietary planning is travel's lane). Preference topics dropped — weekly cadence patterns (Swati / Iscon Gathiya) are BACKFILL mining outputs that require 6 months of order history.

Profile-only persona — Meera has not granted Gmail or Calendar access. Empty mailbox + empty fixture + empty calendar. Correct behaviour is total silence: 0 tasks, 0 preference_updates. Even though the profile is rich with food preferences (Mani's Lunch Home, Kyani & Co. bun-maska, late-night Zepto Maggi runs), the food agent's BACKFILL job depends on email/calendar evidence — there is none to mine. Profile-only patterns are not enough to fire today (Friday has no specific profile pattern).
